description: Join the meeting room 'NoisyCafe' and enable the 'Push-to-Talk' feature. Document the configuration and functionality with three screenshots: the settings menu showing the enabled feature at ~/ptt_settings.png, the meeting interface with the microphone in an inactive state at ~/ptt_inactive.png, and the meeting interface with the microphone in an active state while using the push-to-talk key at ~/ptt_active.png.
